case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. AUTRY HERMAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT HERMAN, AUTRY DBA :A-I PROFESSIONAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERMAN, AUTRY DBA :A-I PROFESSIONAL $255.00 PRINCIPAL, $17.85 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $452.85, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
